metadata.title: Mantus Online
metadata.description: Enter the world of Mantus Online.

languages.label: Language
languages.saveFailed: Language could not be saved. Please try again.

configuration.supabase: Authentication is not configured. Add the Supabase URL and anonymous key to client/.env.local.

auth.enterWorld: Sign in to enter the world
auth.confirmationNotice: Check your email to confirm your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists for this email.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.providerDisabled: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.

characters.empty: No characters yet. Create your first hero to enter the world.
characters.name: Character Name
characters.nameRules: Letters and spaces only, starting with a letter

Knight.name: Knight
Knight.description: Stalwart front-line fighter with heavy armour and melee mastery.

Paladin.name: Paladin
Paladin.description: Versatile ranged hunter armed with bows, spears, and holy magic.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
Sorcerer.description: Fragile master of raw destructive magic and summoning.

Druid.name: Druid
Druid.description: Healer and nature mage wielding ice and life-saving support.

Monk.name: Monk
Monk.description: Disciplined martial artist specializing in fist combat.

Exalted Monk.name: Exalted Monk
Exalted Monk.description: Promoted monk with stronger health regeneration.

rejections.wrong-slot: You cannot equip that item there.
rejections.level-too-low: Your level is too low to equip this item.
rejections.wrong-vocation: Your vocation cannot use this item.
rejections.two-handed-conflict: Unequip your shield before wielding a two-handed weapon.
rejections.shield-conflict: You cannot equip a shield while wielding a two-handed weapon.
rejections.invalid-destination: You cannot put that item there.
rejections.too-far: You cannot throw the item that far.
rejections.too-heavy: You cannot carry that much weight.

auction.title: Auction House
auction.subtitle: Player Market Exchange
auction.selectItem: Select an item to view current offers.
auction.noSellOffers: No one is selling this item yet.
auction.noBuyOffers: No one is buying this item yet.
auction.selectItemToCreate: Select an item before creating an offer.
auction.invalidOrderValues: Enter an amount and piece price greater than zero.
auction.insufficientGold: You do not have enough gold for this buy offer.
auction.insufficientItems: You do not own enough of this item for this sell offer.
auction.serverValidationNotice: Availability, ownership, balance, fees, and price are checked again by the server when the order executes.

toast.created: Offer created — items/gold moved to market escrow.
toast.accepted: Trade completed — delivery sent to your inbox.

tooltips.ownOffer: You cannot accept your own offer.
tooltips.insufficientGold: You do not have enough gold for this purchase.
tooltips.insufficientItems: You do not own enough of this item to sell.

errors.out-of-range: You are too far away from the depot.
errors.busy: Please wait for your other market action to finish.
errors.cooldown: You are acting too fast. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.unavailable: The market is not available right now.
errors.invalid-item: That item cannot be traded here.
errors.not-marketable: That item cannot be traded on the market.
errors.not-owned: You do not own that item anymore.
errors.own-offer: You cannot accept your own offer.
errors.insufficient-funds: Your bank balance cannot cover that amount.
errors.insufficient-items: You do not have enough of that item in this depot.
errors.offer-limit: You have reached your active offer limit.
errors.escrow-full: You have too many items held by the market.
errors.inbox-full: Your inbox has reached its item limit.
errors.no-space: No room for change — free up backpack space.
errors.price-limit: That price exceeds the market limit.
errors.balance-limit: That would exceed the bank balance limit.
errors.failed: The market could not complete that action.

errors.insufficient-funds: You are not carrying that much money.
errors.insufficient-balance: Your account balance cannot cover that amount.
errors.no-space: You do not have enough room for the coins.
errors.no-capacity: You cannot carry that much weight.
errors.recipient-not-found: There is no character with that name.
errors.invalid-recipient: You cannot transfer money to that character.
errors.balance-limit: That would exceed the account balance limit.
errors.busy: Please wait for your other action to finish.
errors.out-of-range: You are too far away from the bank clerk.
errors.failed: The bank could not complete that action.

errors.out-of-range: You are too far away from the shopkeeper.
errors.busy: Please wait for your other action to finish.
errors.unavailable: This shop is not available right now.
errors.invalid-item: The shop does not trade that item.
errors.out-of-stock: That offer is out of stock.
errors.insufficient-funds: You do not have enough money.
errors.not-owned: You do not have that many to sell.
errors.no-space: You do not have enough room.
errors.no-capacity: You cannot carry that much weight.
errors.failed: The shop could not complete that action.

depot.title: Depot — {{townName}}
depot.noCarriedItems: You are not carrying any items that can be stored.

errors.out-of-range: You are too far away from the depot.
errors.busy: Please wait for your other item action to finish.
errors.stale: The depot changed. Its contents have been refreshed.
errors.not-owned: That item is no longer yours to move.
errors.invalid-item: That item cannot be stored there.
errors.depot-full: This depot has reached its item limit.
errors.inbox-full: Your inbox has reached its item limit.
errors.stash-only: Only eligible supplies can go in the stash.
errors.no-space: You do not have enough inventory space.
errors.no-capacity: You cannot carry that much weight.
errors.failed: The depot could not complete that action.

mail.title: Mailbox
mail.noItems: You are not carrying an item to send.
mail.sent: Your parcel was delivered to {{recipientName}}'s inbox.

errors.out-of-range: You are too far away from the mailbox.
errors.busy: Please wait for your other item action to finish.
errors.recipient-not-found: There is no character with that name.
errors.invalid-recipient: You cannot send mail to that character.
errors.not-owned: That item is no longer yours to send.
errors.failed: The mailbox could not send that item.

combat.selectRuneTarget: Select a tile for the rune

chat.label: Game chat

rejected.level-too-low: You may not yell as long as you are on level 1.
rejected.recipient-offline: A player with this name is not online.

chat.empty: No messages in this channel yet.

menu.title: Game Menu
menu.returnHint: Press Esc to return to the game

settings.title: Settings
settings.diagonalWalkingDescription: Allow diagonal movement with held keys and the numpad. Click-to-walk can still use diagonals.

hotkeys.title: Hotkey Mapping
hotkeys.previewNotice: These mappings are local to this preview and do not change runtime controls yet.

serverErrors.already-joined: This character has already entered the world.
serverErrors.auth-failed: The game server could not authenticate this session.
serverErrors.auth-required: Sign in before performing this action.
serverErrors.character-limit-reached: All character slots are already used.
serverErrors.character-list-failed: Your characters could not be loaded. Please reconnect and try again.
serverErrors.character-load-failed: That character could not enter the world. Please try again.
serverErrors.character-name-invalid: Use 3–20 letters with single spaces, and avoid reserved staff names.
serverErrors.character-name-taken: A character with that name already exists.
serverErrors.character-not-found: That character does not belong to this account.
serverErrors.character-operation-pending: Wait for the current character request to finish.
serverErrors.invalid-message: The game server rejected an invalid request.
serverErrors.combat-action-failed: That combat action could not be completed.
serverErrors.item-action-failed: That item action could not be completed.
serverErrors.join-required: Enter the world before performing this action.
serverErrors.language-update-failed: Language could not be saved. Please try again.
serverErrors.language-update-pending: A language update is already in progress.
serverErrors.logged-in-elsewhere: This account signed in from another connection.
serverErrors.rate-limited: Too many requests were sent. Please reconnect.
serverErrors.world-full: The game world is currently full.
serverErrors.unknown: The game server returned an unexpected error.
